name: Acipco
description_short: ACIPCO Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union serving employees, retirees, and families of American Cast Iron Pipe Company in Birmingham, Alabama, offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards.
description_long:
ACIPCO Federal Credit Union operates as a field-of-membership credit union primarily serving employees and retirees of American Cast Iron Pipe Company (ACIPCO), located on the company's plant site in North Birmingham, Alabama. The institution has been serving its membership base with federally insured deposit accounts and lending products. Like all credit unions, ACIPCO FCU is member-owned and not-for-profit, operating under NCUA federal insurance and utilizing a routing number (262087447) for transactions.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including checking accounts, savings/deposit accounts, share certificates, consumer loans, real estate loans, auto loans, and a Visa credit card. Members have access to online banking, mobile banking apps for iPhone, iPad, and Android, automated telephone teller service (Pipeline), and surcharge-free ATM access through a network. The institution also provides loan calculators, fee schedules, and fraud protection resources to support member financial management.

ACIPCO FCU distinguishes itself through its employment-based membership model and lifetime membership benefit—once a member joins, they retain membership status even if they change jobs or relocate, provided they maintain minimum balance requirements and continue using services. The credit union maintains physical branch presence with specific office hours (Monday-Thursday 8 a.m.–4:30 p.m., Friday 6 a.m.–4:30 p.m. with extended drive-thru until 5 p.m.) and offers multiple contact methods including phone, email, fax, and mobile app access. Their featured rates include a Visa credit card at 9.99% APR and auto loans starting at 4.75% APR.

As a specialized credit union with restricted membership eligibility tied to ACIPCO employment or family connections, this institution is not universally accessible but provides deeply integrated financial services for its specific membership community. The website emphasizes security (fraud alerts, authentication code warnings) and member convenience (multiple access channels, service center locations). However, prospective members should verify current membership requirements and product availability, as credit union offerings and rates vary based on membership status and account type.
services: Online banking and home banking platform
Surcharge-free ATM access and ATM locator
pros: Lifetime membership benefit—once joined, members retain access even after changing jobs or moving, provided they maintain minimum balances
Federally insured NCUA credit union with no-profit member-owned structure, typically offering competitive rates
Multiple digital access channels: online banking, mobile apps for iOS and Android, automated telephone teller service (Pipeline)
Competitive featured rates: 9.99% APR Visa credit card and 4.75% auto loans
Surcharge-free ATM network access included for members
Convenient branch location on ACIPCO plant site with extended Friday hours (6 a.m.–4:30 p.m., drive-thru until 5 p.m.)
Comprehensive product suite including checking, savings, consumer loans, real estate loans, and credit cards
cons: Restricted membership eligibility—limited to ACIPCO employees, retirees, family members, and relatives of existing members; not open to general public
Single physical branch location (North Birmingham, AL) may be inconvenient for non-local members despite surcharge-free ATM network
Website content does not specify minimum balance requirements, fees, or detailed loan terms, requiring phone contact for complete information
Limited online transparency regarding current rates, APRs, and product features compared to larger financial institutions
No mention of specialized services like business accounts, investment products, or wealth management services
best_for: Current and former ACIPCO employees seeking member-owned credit union benefits with lifetime membership
Family members and relatives of ACIPCO employees eligible for membership who want nonprofit financial services
Birmingham, Alabama-area members seeking local credit union branch access with extended hours and surcharge-free ATM usage
Consumers prioritizing competitive rates on auto loans and credit cards with personalized member service
diagnosis: ACIPCO Federal Credit Union is best for ACIPCO employees, retirees, and their eligible family members seeking nonprofit credit union banking with competitive rates and lifetime membership benefits. The primary caveat is restricted membership eligibility—this credit union is not open to the general public and requires employment affiliation or family connection to an existing member to join.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
